{{Quote|Ortin is taking a huge risk doing what he's done today.|[[Gerta Haman]]|<ref name="A Revelation">{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}}</ref>}}
[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] '''Ortin''' was a [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] in the employ of the [[Office of Peace and Security]] in [[Gadrin]]. He was also a member of the [[Cularin resistance]], one of the few who did not disappear from their normal lives to reside in the resistance's base within the [[Cloud Mountain mines]]. When [[Gerta Haman]] needed to recruit some outsiders for a mission to infiltrate the [[Metatheran Cartel]]'s [[Metatheran Cartel operations office|operations office]], she sent Ortin to gather them and bring them to a hidden room in the [[OPS third sector precinct house]].

Ortin was also in place to assist these outsiders get out of jail should they have been caught breaking and entering the Cartel's offices.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}} {{1st}}
